title: Ken Takakura Sky Overlay
description: famous ken takakura from dandadan sky overlay (base form)
body:
This Pack Illustrates the beautiful ken takakura from the hit anime Dandadan

How to install Download Texturepack Go to %appdata% -> Copy .zip to /Roaming/.minecraft/resourcepacks 

**This resource pack requires the mod FabricSkyBoxes. Without it, you will not be able to see it.**

![Ken Takakura](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/626f59cc69960bcc16e2514534ef331df1aa231b_0.webp)
